priority_flags: ⚑ Displaced Student — May Need Extra Support

agent3.summary: This student is performing well academically with a strong 1st semester GPA, but their 2nd semester grade suggests potential for improvement.

interventions.action: Encourage the student to explore academic resources and support services offered by the institution.
interventions.when: After the student's 2nd semester grade is reviewed

interventions.action: Provide the student with information about tutoring and study skills workshops.
interventions.when: During the student's first week of the semester

interventions.action: Offer the student a one-on-one meeting to discuss their academic progress and goals.
interventions.when: After the student's 2nd semester grade is reviewed

agent3.message_to_student: Keep up the great work! There are resources available to help you succeed, so don't hesitate to reach out if you need any assistance.
